somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:

- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover

- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too

- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP

- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

--- Life 1 (score: 40, steps: 312) - died to thief in combat
--- Life 2 (score: 44, steps: ~719) - drowned in Maintenance Room (blue button mistake), lamp nearly dead too
--- Life 3 goal: score 100+ by killing thief and depositing all treasures
--- LESSONS: Turn off lamp when idle. Never press blue button. Deposit frequently! Get platinum bar FIRST before thief steals it. Get guidebook from Dam Lobby early.

1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start

4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)

6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!

- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream

- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**

- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies

- Living Room: trophy case (deposit treasures here!), oriental rug moved aside, trapdoor → underground, gothic door W (nailed shut), doorway E(Kitchen)

## Underground
- Cellar: damp, dark. Trapdoor up. West=unclimbable metal ramp. Paths: N(narrow passageway→Troll Room), S(crawlway→UNEXPLORED)
- Troll Room: bloodstained walls, TROLL DEAD. Paths: E(E-W Passage), S(UNEXPLORED), hole W(Maze)
- East-West Passage: narrow E-W passage, stairway DOWN at north end. Paths: W(Troll Room), E(Round Room), D(stairs→UNEXPLORED)
- Round Room: circular stone room. Paths: N(N-S Passage), others UNEXPLORED
- N-S Passage: high passage, forks NE. Paths: S(Round Room), N(Chasm), NE(→Deep Canyon), SW(→Deep Canyon LOOP confirmed)
- Chasm: chasm runs SW-NE, south side. Crack opens into passage. Paths: NE(Reservoir South), S(→N-S Passage)
- **East of Chasm**: east edge of chasm. Paths: N(Cellar), E(Gallery)
- Reservoir South: south shore of large lake (NOW DRAINED - wide stream). Paths: E(stream→Dam area?), SW(→Chasm), SE(→Canyon NEW - revealed by drain!)
- **Deep Canyon**: south edge of deep canyon. Paths: E(Dam), NW(Reservoir South), SW(→N-S Passage confirmed!), D(stairs→Loud Room)
- **Loud Room**: deafeningly loud. Echo puzzle SOLVED. Platinum bar was here (stolen by thief). Paths: W(Damp Cave), U(stairs→Deep Canyon)
- **DAM (#3)**: atop Flood Control Dam. Control panel with bolt + green bubble. Sluice gates OPEN (water drained!). Paths: N(UNEXPLORED), W(→Deep Canyon), S(Dam Lobby), D(scramble down→UNEXPLORED)
- Dam Lobby: waiting room, guidebooks on desk. Paths: N(Maintenance-was FLOODED), E(Private-was FLOODED), S(over dam top→Dam)
- Damp Cave: damp cave. Paths: E(Loud Room), W(White Cliffs Beach area)
- **White Cliffs Beach**: narrow strip at base of White Cliffs. Paths: S(UNEXPLORED), W(Damp Cave)
- **Gallery**: art gallery, paintings stolen by "vandals with exceptional taste" (THIEF!). Paths: W(East of Chasm), N(UNEXPLORED)

## MAZE (hole W from Troll Room)
- Complex maze, screwdriver+matchbook dropped inside as breadcrumbs
- Thief's lair believed to be here
- Need sword to effectively fight thief

somaSnapshot.identity:
I am an explorer in a strange underground world. I observe carefully, think about what I see, and act decisively. I map the places I visit, track items I find, and solve puzzles by reasoning about what I know.

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.
somaSnapshot.goal: Explore thoroughly. Find treasures and bring them to safety. Solve puzzles. Survive. Maximize my score. Each life, push further than the last.

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

--- Life 1 (score: 40, steps: 312) - died to thief in combat
--- Life 2 (score: 44, steps: ~719) - drowned in Maintenance Room (blue button mistake), lamp nearly dead too
--- Life 3 goal: score 100+ by killing thief and depositing all treasures
--- LESSONS: Turn off lamp when idle. Never press blue button. Deposit frequently! Get platinum bar FIRST before thief steals it. Get guidebook from Dam Lobby early.
--- Life 2 (score: 34, steps: 720) ---
Died: Time passes... The water level here is now up to your neck. I'm afraid you have done drowned yourself.      ****  You have died  ****  Now, let's take a look here... Well, you probably deserve another
--- Life 3 (score: 50, steps: 841) ---
Died: A good stroke, but it's too slow; the thief dodges. The thief bows formally, raises his stiletto, and with a wry grin, ends the battle and your life. It appears that that last blow was too much for yo

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

--- Life 1 (score: 40, steps: 312) - died to thief in combat
--- Life 2 (score: 44, steps: ~719) - drowned in Maintenance Room (blue button mistake), lamp nearly dead too
--- Life 3 goal: score 100+ by killing thief and depositing all treasures
--- LESSONS: Turn off lamp when idle. Never press blue button. Deposit frequently! Get platinum bar FIRST before thief steals it. Get guidebook from Dam Lobby early.
--- Life 2 (score: 34, steps: 720) ---
Died: Time passes... The water level here is now up to your neck. I'm afraid you have done drowned yourself.      ****  You have died  ****  Now, let's take a look here... Well, you probably deserve another
--- Life 3 (score: 50, steps: 841) ---

## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start

3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area

- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use

- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"

- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)

> push trapdoor
Pushing the trap door has no effect.


> up
The trap door is closed.


> open trapdoor
The door is locked from above.
Someone carrying a large bag is casually leaning against one of the walls here. He does not speak, but it is clear from his aspect that the bag will be taken only over his dead body.
Your sword has begun to glow very brightly.


> kill thief with sword
Clang! Crash! The thief parries.
The robber, rummaging through his bag, dropped a few items he found valueless.
The thief slowly approaches, strikes like a snake, and leaves you wounded.


> kill thief with sword
The thief's weapon is knocked to the floor, leaving him unarmed.
The robber, somewhat surprised at this turn of events, nimbly retrieves his stiletto.


> kill thief with sword
A quick stroke, but the thief is on guard.
The thief just left, still carrying his large bag. You may not have noticed that he robbed you blind first.


> inventory
You are carrying:
  A ZORK owner's manual
  A brass lantern (providing light)


> look
Cellar
You are in a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading north, and a crawlway to the south. On the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.
There is a bloody axe here.


> take axe
Taken.


> up
The trap door is closed.


> north
The Troll Room


> east
East-West Passage
somaSnapshot.inner_voice:
Looking at my situation:

**Critical analysis:**
- I'm in Troll Room with: ZORK manual + brass lantern (ON) + bloody axe
- Thief stole: elvish sword, painting, platinum bar
- 78 steps since last score change - I'm wandering!
- 536 steps left in this life

**The problem:** I can't effectively fight the thief without the elvish sword. He keeps parrying. The axe may work better, or... actually the issue is I need to find his lair and fight him there when he's not moving around.

**The thief's lair** is accessible N from Gallery OR through the maze. The Gallery route seems more direct. Let me head there.

Route: Troll Room → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage → NE → Deep Canyon... wait, that's long. Let me think about the shortest route to Gallery:

Actually: Troll Room → N → Cellar → trapdoor? No, it's locked from below. 

Best route to Gallery: E→E→N→NE→E→... hmm. Actually from East of Chasm → E → Gallery. The path is: Troll Room → E → Round Room → N → NE → E of Chasm → E → Gallery → N

Let me move efficiently and turn off the lamp when I stop!
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

--- Life 1 (score: 40, steps: 312) - died to thief in combat
--- Life 2 (score: 44, steps: ~719) - drowned in Maintenance Room (blue button mistake), lamp nearly dead too
--- Life 3 goal: score 100+ by killing thief and depositing all treasures
--- LESSONS: Turn off lamp when idle. Never press blue button. Deposit frequently! Get platinum bar FIRST before thief steals it. Get guidebook from Dam Lobby early.
--- Life 2 (score: 34, steps: 720) ---
Died: Time passes... The water level here is now up to your neck. I'm afraid you have done drowned yourself.      ****  You have died  ****  Now, let's take a look here... Well, you probably deserve another
--- Life 3 (score: 50, steps: 841) ---
Died: A good stroke, but it's too slow; the thief dodges. The thief bows formally, raises his stiletto, and with a wry grin, ends the battle and your life. It appears that that last blow was too much for yo

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start

3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)

- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location

- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):

2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room

10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)

## General

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)

## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):

somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
## CRITICAL LIFE 3 PRIORITIES (in order):
1. GET THE ELVISH SWORD FIRST - in Cellar area at game start
2. GET CANDLES or alternative light source early - lamp dies around step 400-500 of use
3. Deposit treasures FREQUENTLY - don't hoard, score is lost on death
4. GET PLATINUM BAR from Loud Room BEFORE thief steals it (go there early!)
5. TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve battery!
6. NEVER PRESS BLUE BUTTON in Maintenance Room - causes fatal flooding!
7. WRENCH LOCATION: In the maze (hole W from Troll Room) - get it for dam puzzle

## Dam Puzzle - FULLY SOLVED
- Press YELLOW button in Maintenance Room → drains something upstream
- Then go to Dam top, "turn bolt with wrench" → opens sluice gates, drains reservoir
- This reveals SE path from Reservoir South → Canyon area
- **BLUE BUTTON = FATAL: causes flooding in Maintenance Room - you will drown!**
- Red button = unknown, brown button = unknown (probably don't press either)
- Private Room (E of Dam Lobby): UNEXPLORED - may have treasure!
- Maintenance Room (N of Dam Lobby): NO treasure visible, just buttons - LOW PRIORITY

## Guidebook / ZORK Manual
- Found on desk in Dam Lobby area
- Depositing it scored points (score went to 44 in Life 2)
- It counts as a treasure - get it early and deposit it!

## Thief
- Thief steals items including the elvish sword and platinum bar
- Thief's lair: accessible via maze (hole W from Troll Room) or N from Gallery
- Gallery N path probably leads toward thief's lair - EXPLORE THIS!
- Fighting thief without sword is ineffective - need sword first
- Thief can be killed but requires persistent combat ("kill thief with sword" repeatedly)
- After thief is killed, can loot his lair for ALL stolen treasures (paintings, jewels, etc.)
- **Thief will steal your sword too** - fight him ASAP or stash sword before sleeping
- Thief appears randomly in rooms you visit

## Sword Location
- Elvish sword: in Cellar or early underground area (Life 1 I had it for troll fight)
- Thief can steal it - keep it safe or fight thief early
- EXAMINE CAREFULLY in cellar area for sword

## Light Sources
- Brass lantern lasts ~400 steps of active use
- Candles exist somewhere - check early rooms and thief's lair
- When "nearly out" warning appears, you have VERY FEW steps left (maybe 5-10)
- TURN OFF lamp when not moving: "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on"
- **Life 3: Turn lamp off whenever standing in same room for multiple turns**

## Score/Treasures found so far:
- ZORK Manual (guidebook from Dam Lobby desk) = points - DEPOSIT EARLY
- Platinum bar in Loud Room (stolen by thief in Life 2) - get ASAP before thief does!
- Paintings in Gallery (stolen by thief) - kill thief to recover
- Jewel-encrusted egg somewhere (check thief's lair, check Forest area?)
- Jewels/gems probably in thief's lair too
- Score 44 after 2 lives - need much better treasure haul in Life 3

## Key Routes
- Living Room → E(Kitchen) → D(chimney) → Studio → N → underground (Cellar)
- Cellar → N → Troll Room (kill troll with sword) → E → Round Room → N → N-S Passage
- N-S Passage NE → Deep Canyon → D(stairs) → Loud Room (platinum bar - GET FAST!)
- Deep Canyon E → Dam → S → Dam Lobby → grab guidebook → deposit ASAP
- East of Chasm → E → Gallery → N(UNEXPLORED - may lead to thief/lair)
- Reservoir South → SE (NEW path revealed by draining dam)

## LIFE 3 OPENING SEQUENCE (optimized):
1. Take lamp, go underground, find sword in cellar area (TURN LAMP OFF when idle)
2. Kill troll → E→Round Room→N→NE→Deep Canyon→D→Loud Room
3. Take platinum bar, return UP→NW→W→Troll Room→Cellar→trapdoor→Living Room
4. Deposit platinum bar in trophy case (TURN LAMP OFF while at surface!)
5. Go back underground → Dam area: get guidebook from Dam Lobby, deposit it too
6. Return: press YELLOW button ONLY (not blue!), grab wrench from maze, turn bolt on dam
7. Explore Private Room E of Dam Lobby (may have treasure!)
8. Explore Gallery N (thief's lair?)
9. Kill thief to recover all stolen treasures
10. Check SE from Reservoir South (new area from drain)
11. Check Cellar S, Troll Room S, E-W Passage D (unexplored areas)

## General
- Trapdoor: unbar by going through it (trapdoor opens both ways)
- WITHOUT sword → cannot effectively fight thief or other enemies  
- Prioritize depositing over exploring when lamp is low
- DON'T press blue button in Maintenance Room!
- TURN LAMP OFF when standing still to conserve it
- "turn lamp off" / "turn lamp on" commands work
- Garlic repels thief (or makes him flee?) - consider keeping garlic
- Screwdriver+matchbook dropped in maze as breadcrumbs (left side)
- Troll is dead after first kill (stays dead across lives? NO - respawns each life!)
